swahili.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Imehamasishwa na HandWaver: jenga kwa kunyoosha nukta → mstari → uso → kigumu
swahili.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Bofya "Mwalimu wa AI" au bonyeza / kupata maarifa kuhusu umbo la sasa.
swahili.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Jenga jiometri kwa kunyoosha nukta kuwa mstari, mstari kuwa uso, na uso kuwa kigumu. Kila kunyoosha huongeza kitu kipya kwenye eneo.
swahili.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Hasa nukta — nyoosha yoyote kuanza kujenga sehemu za mstari.
swahili.line_segments_dominate_stretching_them: Sehemu za mstari zinatawala. Kuzinyoosha kwa wima hutoa nyuso.
swahili.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Mistatili inatawala. Nyoosha kwa wima na uso kutoa prismu.
swahili.solids_dominate_each_prism_has_interio: Vigumu vinatawala. Kila prismu ina ujazo wa ndani na mpaka wa uso.
swahili.stretch_analyzer_inquiry_widget: 📐 Kichanganuzi cha Kunyoosha — Wijeti ya Uchunguzi
swahili.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Tabiri sifa za jiometri unaponyoosha. Hakuna ufunguo wa majibu — wewe unaalama uelewa wako mwenyewe.
swahili.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Dhana yako (ni kunyoosha gani kunakua urefu haraka — eneo haraka — ujazo haraka?)
swahili.e_g_stretching_a_segment_perpendicular: k.m., kunyoosha sehemu kwa wima huongeza eneo mara mbili lakini ujazo unahitaji kunyoosha kwa pili...
swahili.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Unaponyoosha sehemu kwa wima na yenyewe, ni nini hutokea kwa idadi ya vipimo vyake?
swahili.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Ikiwa kitovu kinahama baada ya kunyoosha, ulinyoosha zaidi katika mwelekeo gani?
swahili.how_does_total_volume_change_vs_total_: Ujazo jumla dhidi ya eneo jumla hubadilikaje unaponyoosha mhimili sawa mara mbili?
swahili.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Ni nini kingefanya ujenzi huu uwe linganifu kuzunguka kitovu chake?
swahili.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Naweza kueleza kwa nini vipimo hivi vinapimika hivyo ninaponyoosha.
swahili.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Wijeti ya uchunguzi — hakuna alama, hakuna kufichua, hakuna kumwaga majibu.
swahili.euler_s_polyhedron_formula_for_any_con: Fomula ya pembesura ya Euler: kwa pembesura yoyote bonyeo, V − E + F = 2
swahili.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow inahitaji uharakishaji wa maunzi kuonyesha michoro ya 3D. Tafadhali wezesha WebGL katika mipangilio ya kivinjari chako kuingiliana na maabara hii.
swahili.interactive_geometry_sandbox_3d_visual: Uonyeshaji wa 3D wa sanduku la jiometri shirikishi
swahili.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Buruta: zungusha • Sogeza: kuza • Bofya-kulia: sogeza
swahili.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Kidokezo: Jibu lako lazima liwe ndani ya 5% ya thamani kamili. Tumia π ≈ 3.14159
swahili.stl_files_are_unit_less_most_3d_printe: 💡 Faili za STL hazina vipimo. Vikataji vingi vya printa za 3D (Cura, PrusaSlicer) hutumia milimita kwa chaguo-msingi. Umbo lenye upana=5 litachapishwa upana wa 5mm.

somali.handwaver_inspired_build_by_stretching: Waxaa dhiirigeliyey HandWaver: dhis adoo fidinaya dhibic → xariiq → diyaarad → adag
somali.click_ai_tutor_or_press_to_get_insight: Guji "Macallin AI" ama riix / si aad u hesho aragti ku saabsan qaabka hadda.
somali.build_geometry_by_stretching_a_point_i: Dhis joomatari adoo fidinaya dhibic una rogaya xariiq, xariiq una rogaya diyaarad, diyaarad una rogaya adag. Fidin kasta waxay ku darayaa shay cusub goobta.
somali.mostly_points_stretch_any_to_begin_bui: Inta badan dhibco — fidi mid kasta si aad u bilowdo dhisidda qaybaha xariiqda.
somali.line_segments_dominate_stretching_them: Qaybaha xariiqda ayaa xukunaya. Fidintooda toosan waxay siisaa diyaarado.
somali.rectangles_dominate_stretch_perpendicu: Laydhyada ayaa xukunaya. Fidi si toosan diyaarad si aad uga soo saarto prisms.
somali.solids_dominate_each_prism_has_interio: Adkayaasha ayaa xukunaya. Prism kasta wuxuu leeyahay mug gudaha ah iyo xudduud dusha sare.
somali.predict_geometry_properties_as_you_str: Saadaali sifooyinka joomatari intaad fidinayso. Ma jiro fure jawaab — adigaa calaamadinaya faham kaaga.
somali.your_hypothesis_what_stretches_grow_le: Mala-awaalkaaga (fidin kee ayaa dhererka ka dhigaya mid degdeg ah — aagga degdeg — mugga degdeg?)
somali.e_g_stretching_a_segment_perpendicular: tusaale, fidinta qayb si toosan waxay labanlaabaysaa aagga laakiin mugga wuxuu u baahan yahay fidin labaad...
somali.when_you_stretch_a_segment_perpendicul: Markaad fidiso qayb si toosan naftiisa, maxaa ku dhaca tirada cabbirradiisa?
somali.if_centroid_shifts_after_a_stretch_wha: Haddii xuddunta u dhaqaaqdo fidin kadib, jihada kee ayaad ugu fidisay?
somali.how_does_total_volume_change_vs_total_: Sidee buu mugga guud ee ka soo horjeeda aagga guud u beddelmaa markaad fidiso isla dhidibka labo jeer?
somali.what_would_make_this_construction_symm: Maxaa ka dhigi lahaa dhismahan mid isku mid ah agagaarka xuddunta?
somali.i_can_explain_why_these_metrics_scale_: Waan sharxi karaa sababta cabbirradan ay sidaas u cabbiraan markaan fidiyo.
somali.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Wijit baaris — dhibco ma jiraan, daah ma jiro, jawaab daadis ma jirto.
somali.no_saved_constructions_yet: Weli ma jiro dhismo la kaydiyay.
somali.euler_s_polyhedron_formula_for_any_con: Qaaciddada poolihedron ee Euler: poolihedron kasta oo gabbal ah, V − E + F = 2
somali.webgl_is_disabled_or_unsupported: WebGL waa la damiyay ama lama taageero
somali.alloflow_requires_hardware_acceleratio: AlloFlow wuxuu u baahan yahay dardargelinta qalabka si uu u muujiyo sawirada 3D. Fadlan dadaji WebGL goobaha browserkaaga si aad ula falgasho shaybaarkan.
somali.interactive_geometry_sandbox_3d_visual: Muujinta 3D ee sanduuqa joomatari isdhexgalka ah
somali.drag_rotate_scroll_zoom_right_click_pa: 🖱️ Jiid: rog • Scroll: weynee • Guji-midig: dhaqaaji
somali.tip_your_answer_must_be_within_5_of_th: 💡 Talo: Jawaabtaadu waa inay ku jirtaa 5% qiimaha saxda ah. Isticmaal π ≈ 3.14159
somali.stl_files_are_unit_less_most_3d_printe: 💡 Faylasha STL ma laha halbeeg. Inta badan slicers-ka daabacaha 3D (Cura, PrusaSlicer) waxay si caadi ah u isticmaalaan millimitir. Qaab leh ballac=5 wuxuu daabacmi doonaa 5mm ballac.
